ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim Of Minor
Off Calendar Apr-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Valerie Papale. Paula L. Gustafson, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Maria Tapia. The Court receives evidence and good cause appearing grants judgment as follows: Fees: $11,456.25, Costs: $631.25 and the balance of $22,912.50 into a blocked account at Bank of America, One Powell Street, San Francisco, CA 94102 and no withdrawal until the minor reaches age l8. Order signed in open court.
